_schema.purpose: Authoritative venue name lookup. Used by zotero_operator.py to (a) resolve OpenReview content.venue.value display strings (which include track suffixes like 'ICLR 2024 poster') to canonical proceedings titles for Zotero proceedingsTitle (Bug 1 fix); and (b) cross-check S2 publicationTypes mistags when publicationVenue.type is missing and pub_types says JournalArticle for an actual conference (Bug 2b fix).
_schema.review_protocol: Every entry MUST cite at least 2 authoritative sources (DBLP, official venue website, Wikipedia, S2 publicationVenue record). Update 'verified_date' when revising. NEVER add an entry from memory - always verify against an authoritative source. If you find a venue not in this file during literature review, do NOT auto-add - leave the venue unhandled (will fall through to track-suffix-strip fallback) and submit the entry for review.

lookup_semantics.openreview_id_globs: fnmatch-style glob patterns matched against OpenReview content.venueid.value (e.g. 'ICLR.cc/*/Conference'). First match wins.
lookup_semantics.s2_venue_aliases: case-insensitive EXACT match against S2 publicationVenue.name and publicationVenue.alternate_names. NO substring matching - prevents over-matching workshop venues that contain a parent conference name.

_schema.no_hardcoding_constraint: This file IS the venue lookup table - it is data, not code. Code (zotero_operator.py) MUST NOT contain venue-specific if/elif chains. Code MUST NOT pattern-match against venue names to derive type/canonical_name; only this file (or a future external authority) is permitted to assert canonical mappings.

verified_sources: DBLP venue stream: https://dblp.org/streams/conf/iclr (DBLP venue title: 'International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)'; per-year proceedings titled 'The {Nth} International Conference on Learning Representations, ICLR YYYY, {city}, {dates}')
OpenReview venue ID format confirmed via openreview_client.py KNOWN_VENUES + live API fetch of forum_id rhgIgTSSxW (TabR ICLR 2024) returning content.venueid.value='ICLR.cc/2024/Conference'

venues.canonical_name: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
s2_venue_aliases: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
verified_sources: DBLP venue stream: https://dblp.org/streams/conf/nips (DBLP venue title: 'Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)'; historical alias 'Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NIPS)' for pre-2018 editions)

Official proceedings: https://proceedings.neurips.cc/ (page titles: 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35' for 2022, 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 34' for 2021, etc. - this is the canonical BibTeX booktitle convention)
OpenReview venue ID format from openreview_client.py KNOWN_VENUES (NeurIPS.cc/2023..2025/Conference)
Note: NIPS was renamed to NeurIPS effective 2018 NeurIPS edition. S2 records for pre-2018 papers may use 'NIPS' or 'Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems' in publicationVenue.name.

DBLP venue stream: https://dblp.org/streams/conf/icml (DBLP venue title: 'International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)'; per-year proceedings titled 'Forty-{Nth} International Conference on Machine Learning, ICML YYYY, {city}, {dates}, Proceedings of Machine Learning Research {volume}, PMLR / OpenReview.net')
OpenReview venue ID format from openreview_client.py KNOWN_VENUES (ICML.cc/2024..2025/Conference)

Note: ICML proceedings are published in PMLR (Proceedings of Machine Learning Research) volumes; S2 may sometimes report venue as 'PMLR' instead of 'International Conference on Machine Learning'. Cross-check via DOI (10.5555/...) if name match fails.
Official: https://colmweb.org/ (homepage banner: 'CONFERENCE ON LANGUAGE MODELING'; about-section: 'COLM is an academic venue focused on the study of language modeling, broadly defined')
Official 2025 archive: https://colmweb.org/2025/ (banner: 'CONFERENCE ON LANGUAGE MODELING')
Call for Papers 2026: https://colmweb.org/cfp.html (text: 'We invite submissions to the 3rd Conference on Language Modeling (COLM)'; OpenReview submission group: 'colmweb.org/COLM/2026/Conference')

OpenReview venue ID format from openreview_client.py KNOWN_VENUES (COLM/2024/Conference). Note: actual OpenReview content.venueid.value may include 'colmweb.org/' prefix - both globs included to handle either case.
Note: First edition 2024; no DBLP stream as of 2026-04-26. May need re-verification when DBLP adds the venue.
